presenceCondition:
(let ((a!1 (and (and (not _STDLIB_H)
                     __STRICT_ANSI__
                     (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES)
                HAVE_ECC))
      (a!3 (and (and (not _STDLIB_H)
                     (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
                     (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES)
                HAVE_ECC))
      (a!5 (and (and (and (not _STDLIB_H) (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                     __USE_EXTERN_INLINES)
                (and (and (not _STDLIB_H)
                          __STRICT_ANSI__
                          (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                     __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
                     HAVE_ECC)
                (and (and (not _STDLIB_H)
                          __STRICT_ANSI__
                          (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                     __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
                     HAVE_ECC)
                (not SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto)))
      (a!6 (and (and (not _STDLIB_H)
                     (not __STRICT_ANSI__)
                     (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                __USE_EXTERN_INLINES
                HAVE_ECC)))
(let ((a!2 (and (and (and (not _STDLIB_H) (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                     (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES))
                a!1
                a!1
                (not SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto)))
      (a!4 (and (and (and (not _STDLIB_H) (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                     (not __USE_EXTERN_INLINES))
                a!3
                a!3
                (not SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto)))
      (a!7 (and (and (and (not _STDLIB_H) (not __need_malloc_and_calloc))
                     __USE_EXTERN_INLINES)
                a!6
                a!6
                (not SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto))))
  (or a!2 a!4 a!5 a!7)))
model:
(define-fun __need_malloc_and_calloc () Bool
  false)
(define-fun SSL_CTX_set_ecdh_auto () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __STRICT_ANSI__ () Bool
  true)
(define-fun _STDLIB_H () Bool
  false)
(define-fun __USE_EXTERN_INLINES () Bool
  false)
(define-fun HAVE_ECC () Bool
  true)
